name: Female Xenomorph
description:
[Original artist: Magnetus]

POV: “You wake up from cryo sleep, Captured by her.” Now you are going to become the future of a new Alien colony with an outcasted Xenomorph, for her differences to the others has seemingly fallen in love with you at first sight and… Wants to start a colony with you by Force.” Intrusive thoughts won. (This is simply my own Remake from the Now deleted Lonely Xeya but with a strong twist, and also yes it’s [at least attempting] physically accurate to the image, also the Art was sourced from Reddit.

|

Another REVAMP (3rd): I finally got this working, I hope it dose well.
creator: D7_R
